question_text: Please contact the front desk if you _____ any questions.
explanation: 主語がyouなので現在形haveが適切です。

question_text: The report must be submitted _____ Friday afternoon.
explanation: 期限を表すbyが適切です。

question_text: Mr. Lee will attend the meeting _____ he returns from Osaka.
explanation: 節を導くwhenが自然です。

question_text: The new office is located _____ the third floor.
explanation: 階を表す時はonを使います。

question_text: All visitors must wear _____ ID badges in the building.
explanation: 名詞ID badgesの前には所有格theirを使います。

question_text: The train to the airport leaves _____ 8:15.
explanation: 時刻の前にはatを使います。

question_text: We need to order more paper because there is _____ left.
explanation: 不可算名詞paperにはlittleを使います。

question_text: This printer is _____ than the old model.
explanation: thanがあるため比較級quieterが適切です。

question_text: The manager asked us to arrive _____ for the workshop.
explanation: 動詞arriveを修飾する副詞earlyが適切です。

question_text: Please _____ the form before you leave.
explanation: 命令文なので動詞の原形completeを使います。

question_text: The cafeteria is open _____ Monday to Friday.
explanation: from A to Bの形です。

question_text: Ms. Gomez is responsible _____ employee training.
explanation: be responsible forが正しい形です。

question_text: The package arrived _____ this morning.
explanation: 今朝早くを表す副詞earlyが適切です。

question_text: We are looking _____ a larger conference room.
explanation: look forで探すという意味です。

question_text: The customer service desk is _____ the entrance.
explanation: 入口の近くを表すnearが適切です。

question_text: The seminar has been postponed _____ the speaker is ill.
explanation: 後ろに節が続くためbecauseが適切です。

question_text: Employees are encouraged _____ public transportation.
explanation: be encouraged to doの形です。

question_text: The sales figures were _____ higher than expected.
explanation: 形容詞higherを修飾する副詞significantlyが適切です。

question_text: If you need assistance, please speak to _____ at reception.
explanation: 人を指すsomeoneが自然です。

question_text: The contract will be reviewed _____ it is signed.
explanation: 署名前に確認するためbeforeが適切です。

question_text: The marketing team is preparing a presentation _____ the new product.
explanation: 新製品についての発表なのでaboutが適切です。

question_text: The hotel offers free breakfast to _____ guests.
explanation: 複数名詞guestsの前にallを使います。

question_text: Please make sure the doors are locked _____ leaving the office.
explanation: 退室前を表すbefore leavingが自然です。

question_text: The invoice was sent to the client _____ email.
explanation: 手段を表すby emailが適切です。

question_text: This guide explains how _____ the online booking system.
explanation: how to doの形です。

question_text: The restaurant is known _____ its seafood dishes.
explanation: be known forで有名であるという意味です。

question_text: The staff meeting, _____ was scheduled for Monday, has been canceled.
explanation: 先行詞がmeetingなのでwhichが適切です。

question_text: Several applicants were invited _____ a second interview.
explanation: interviewの目的にはforが自然です。

question_text: The museum is closed today _____ maintenance work.
explanation: 名詞句maintenance workの前にはdue toを使います。

question_text: Our company plans _____ a new branch next year.
explanation: plan to doの形です。

question_text: The instructions should be read _____ before installation.
explanation: 動詞readを修飾する副詞carefullyが適切です。

question_text: The shop provides a discount for customers _____ pay in cash.
explanation: customersを説明する関係代名詞whoが適切です。

question_text: The new schedule is more convenient _____ the previous one.
explanation: 比較級more convenientにはthanを使います。

question_text: All equipment must be returned _____ the storage room after use.
explanation: 返却先を表すtoが適切です。

question_text: The airport shuttle runs _____ thirty minutes.
explanation: every thirty minutesで30分ごとです。

question_text: The presentation was delayed because the projector was not working _____.
explanation: 動作を修飾する副詞properlyが適切です。

question_text: Had the shipment arrived earlier, we _____ the order yesterday.
explanation: 仮定法過去完了ではwould have過去分詞を使います。

question_text: The candidate _____ experience best matches the position will be contacted.
explanation: experienceを所有する関係を表すwhoseが適切です。

question_text: The proposal requires _____ review before it can be approved.
explanation: 追加の検討を表すfurther reviewが自然です。

question_text: No sooner had the store opened _____ customers began lining up.
explanation: no sooner had...thanの倒置表現です。

question_text: The policy applies to all employees, _____ of their department.
explanation: regardless ofの形です。

question_text: The manager insisted that the report _____ revised immediately.
explanation: insist that節では原形beを使う仮定法現在です。

question_text: The building, _____ entrance faces the station, is easy to find.
explanation: entranceを所有する関係を表すwhoseが適切です。

question_text: Only after the inspection _____ the equipment be used.
explanation: Only afterで始まる倒置では助動詞canが前に出ます。

question_text: The revised manual is intended _____ new employees understand the process.
explanation: be intended to doの形です。

question_text: The supplier failed to deliver the parts _____ the agreed deadline.
explanation: 期限までにという意味でbyが適切です。

question_text: The more detailed the plan is, _____ it will be to estimate costs.
explanation: the 比較級, the 比較級の構文です。

question_text: The company is seeking ways to reduce expenses without _____ quality.
explanation: withoutの後は動名詞compromisingです。

question_text: The product launch was postponed pending _____ approval from the legal team.
explanation: 名詞approvalを修飾する形容詞finalが適切です。

question_text: The consultant recommended that the team _____ the survey results again.
explanation: recommend that節では動詞の原形reviewを使います。
